Vet Clinic Reception.name: Vet Clinic Reception
Vet Clinic Reception.description: The reception desk is unmanned. A nameplate reads the name of the person you are looking for. A half-drunk coffee cup is still warm. Somewhere in the back, something knocks over.
Vet Clinic Reception.first_entry_text:
The front door swings open under your hand - unlocked. The bell above it chimes.

Somewhere deeper in the building, a door slams.

furniture.name: Reception Desk
furniture.description: Standard laminate desk. A drawer is slightly open.

objects.name: Nameplate
objects.description: The nameplate reads the name of the person you came here for. They were here minutes ago.

objects.name: Coffee Cup
objects.description: Still warm. Whoever left this left in a hurry.

objects.name: Wall Calendar
objects.description: Today is circled in red. Below it, in small handwriting: 'Don't be alone today.'

Exam Room.name: Exam Room
Exam Room.description: A sterile exam room with a stainless steel table. Locked drug cabinet on the wall. The smell of antiseptic is sharp. The cabinet's lock looks like it was recently forced.

furniture.name: Drug Cabinet
furniture.description: A heavy steel cabinet with a reinforced lock. It hangs open - someone got here before you. Two labeled vials remain inside.

furniture.name: Exam Table
furniture.description: Stainless steel table with paper crinkled across it - someone was sitting here recently.

objects.name: Medical Posters
objects.description: Anatomical diagrams of dogs and cats. Someone has drawn an X over one of the figures with a red marker.

objects.name: Biohazard Bin
objects.description: A red biohazard disposal container. Full.

Supply Corridor.name: Supply Corridor
Supply Corridor.description: A long narrow corridor connecting the clinic to the adjoining industrial storage building. The walls are institutional beige. One of the fluorescent lights flickers in a slow, rhythmic pattern.

objects.name: Flickering Light
objects.description: The fluorescent tube buzzes and dims in a metronomic pattern, like a heartbeat.

objects.name: Service Door
objects.description: A heavy door leading to the industrial section. Propped open with a folded piece of paper.

Industrial Storage.name: Industrial Storage
Industrial Storage.description: A massive echoing warehouse space attached to the clinic for bulk supply storage. Shipping crates are stacked dangerously high. An emergency medical station is bolted to the far wall. The smell of cardboard and industrial cleaner.

furniture.name: Emergency Medical Station
furniture.description: A bright red wall-mounted cabinet marked EMERGENCY - AED. Unlatched.

furniture.name: Foreman's Lockbox
furniture.description: A heavy steel lockbox on a shelf. Combination lock, but the combination is written on a sticky note on the shelf above it. Someone trusted that no one would look.

objects.name: Shipping Crates
objects.description: Stacked to the ceiling. Some of them are leaning at angles that defy physics.

objects.name: Sticky Note
objects.description: On the shelf above the lockbox: '4-7-9-2'. Someone really trusted in security by obscurity.
